calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-02-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Darrin Ng appearing by zoom for Elsie Dokko and Patty Lee (executors).

Discussion was held regarding the estate cash over $540,000.00 and being over the FDIC limit. First and final report of executor on waiver account etc., is taken under submission with intent to allow the executors' final report and grant all other relief as prayed.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Svahlin. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-11-2023 Continued To Aug-01-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-16-2023 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-16-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-11-2023 Continued To May-16-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Harneet Dhaliwal appearing via zoom for Patty Lee and Elsie Dokko (Co-Executors).

Ms. Dhaliwal stated that she is waiting to get the Petition for final distribution signed by the second executor, that the second executor is coming in tomorrow, that she can file the petition by the end of the week and that she is not sure about the Inventory and Appraisal. The Court stated that it wants an Inventory and Appraisal, and a Petition for Final Distribution filed. Status on close of estate is continued to May 16, 2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. The Court will issue an Order to Show Cause to Patty Lee and Elsie Dokko (Co-Executors) to appear on May 16, 2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 to show why they should not be sanctioned $250.00 each for failure to filethe Inventory and Appraisal. The Inventory and Appraisal is to be filed one month from today.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: M. Svahlin. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-14-2023 Continued To Apr-11-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-08-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Feb-09-2021 is admitted to probate. Patty Lee and Elsie Dokko are appointed Executors of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Mar-14-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two-weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Gomez Not reported.
